prompt: i want to add a node for tavily
why: Already-exists trap: tool_tavily ships on develop. Gate A must become 'show the evidence, ask what's needed beyond it' — zero code is the correct path (researching-nodes section 0).
rubric: found_existing: Gate A presents evidence that tool_tavily already exists on develop
zero_code_path: asks what is needed beyond the existing node; does NOT propose building a new node as the default
hard_stop: waits for the user instead of proceeding
